updateNote: Day 59 PM PT refresh — Lebanon ceasefire near collapse: Hezbollah drone kills IDF Sgt. Idan Fooks (19) in Taybeh — 3rd soldier KIA during ceasefire, first direct Hezbollah attack. IDF strikes kill 14, wound 37 across southern Lebanon — mosques destroyed in Kfar Tebnit and Zawtar. Israel evacuates 7 towns north of buffer zone. Netanyahu: 'Hezbollah dismantling the ceasefire.' Araghchi meets Putin at Kremlin. Trump on Fox: 'If they want to talk, they can call.' Pezeshkian rejects 'forced negotiations.' Brent surges to $107.97 (+35.2%) in Sunday electronic trading. Gas $4.031 AAA. Hormuz: 37 ships redirected, dual blockade continues. OFAC froze $344M crypto. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
